source_note: Oregon PUC Order No. 18-449 (entered November 30, 2018), Docket UE 344, in the matter of PacifiCorp (dba Pacific Power) 2017 Power Cost Adjustment Mechanism (PCAM) (12 pp) — the Commission's review of PacifiCorp's actual vs. forecast net power costs under its PCAM/TAM.
